name: t3code-mobile
description: Unofficial Android and iPhone companion app with optional HTTPS/PWA proxy for T3 Code.

scripts.check:js: node --check server.js && node --check generate-icons.js && node --check sw.js && node --check check-release.js && node --check smoke-proxy.js && node --check webview-harness.js && node --check lib/html.js && node --check test/test-html.js
scripts.lint: eslint server.js smoke-proxy.js check-release.js webview-harness.js generate-icons.js sw.js lib/html.js test/test-html.js
scripts.test: npm run check:js && npm run lint && npm run check:manifest && npm run check:repo && npm run test:units && npm run test:proxy

author: JSvandijk
